instruction: Help me fill the Q2 targets from the meeting minutes into the spreadsheet

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Meeting Minutes: 2025 Q1 Review
Attendees: Zhang Wei, Li Na, Wang Qiang, Zhao Min
Meeting Date: March 15, 2025
Discussion Items:
  1. Q1 sales completion: 105% of annual target achieved
  2. Q2 target setting: 15% growth over Q1
  3. Key client follow-up: prioritize top 10 clients
Resolution: Q2 target set at 11.5M CNY, led by Zhang Wei' > /home/user/Desktop/meeting_record.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Item'; ws['B1'] = 'Owner'; ws['C1'] = 'Target Value'; ws['D1'] = 'Remarks'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/q2_targets.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me fill the Q2 targets from the meeting minutes into the spreadsheet
Fill the Q2 target information from /home/user/Desktop/meeting_record.txt into /home/user/Desktop/q2_targets.xlsx row 2: A2='Q2 Sales Target', B2='Zhang Wei', C2=1150, D2='15% growth over Q1', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/q2_targets.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Zhang Wei' in s else 'FAILED')"
